title: I2C sensor node on ESP32-WROOM
prompt: Add an I2C sensor breakout to my ESP32-WROOM-32 running from its 3.3 V rail. Wire it to the I2C pins with proper pull-ups to 3.3 V, power and ground the module, and budget for its supply current. For the bench check the idle I2C lines should rest at 3.3 V through the pull-ups.

abstraction.reason: the I2C sensor's data path is out of analog scope (M8); only supply draw + open-drain pull-up topology is modelled per the #105 I2C stub convention
